name: otel-insights
description: Surface OpenTelemetry agent telemetry — traces, metrics, and logs — directly in VS Code.

languageModelTools.name: otel-insights_listTraces
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns a list of recent traces — most recent first — with traceId, root span name, service name, timestamp, duration, span count, and whether the trace has errors. Supports filtering by serviceName, time window (since/until), errorsOnly flag, and span attribute values. To filter by a specific attribute, provide attributeKey (e.g. 'gen_ai.request.model') and attributeValue (e.g. 'gpt-4o'). To do a loose search across all attributes, provide only attributeValue. To find traces from a specific period (e.g. 'yesterday'), use both since and until together (e.g. since='2d' until='1d'). Follow up with getTrace to drill into any trace's full span tree.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Browse recent traces with optional service and time filters.

serviceName.description: Filter traces to a specific service name.

since.description: Only include traces after this point. Relative: '5m', '1h', '24h', '7d'. Absolute: ISO 8601 string.

until.description: Only include traces before this point. Relative: '1d' means 'more than 1 day ago'. Use with since to isolate a window, e.g. since='2d' until='1d' = yesterday only.

limit.description: Maximum number of traces to return. Defaults to 20.

errorsOnly.description: When true, only return traces that contain at least one errored span.

attributeKey.description: Attribute name to filter on (e.g. 'gen_ai.request.model', 'http.method'). Use with attributeValue for an exact match.

attributeValue.description: Attribute value to filter on. If attributeKey is also provided, matches exactly on that key. If used alone, does a substring search across all span attributes.

languageModelTools.name: otel-insights_getTrace
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Given any traceId, returns the complete span tree for that trace. Each span shows its status (OK/ERROR), kind, duration, parent/root relationship, start time, and notable attributes (exception details, HTTP method/URL/status, DB statements, gen_ai model/tool attributes). Works for any trace — not just errors. Use this to understand exactly what happened during a request, agent run, or task. Get traceIds from listTraces.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect the full span tree for any trace.

traceId.description: The trace ID to inspect. Obtain from listTraces or findRecentErrors.

languageModelTools.name: otel-insights_getServiceSummary
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns a full performance profile for a single service or agent, filtered by its service_name. Includes: trace count, error rate, p50/p95 latency, slowest operations, LLM token usage, and tool call stats — all scoped to that service. Call without a serviceName first to list available services. Use this to compare two agents (e.g. Codex vs Copilot) by calling it once per service and comparing the results. ALWAYS use this when the user asks why one agent is faster, slower, or uses more tokens than another.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get a detailed telemetry breakdown for a specific service or agent.

serviceName.description: The service_name to filter by (e.g. 'codex', 'copilot'). Omit to list all available service names.

since.description: Only include telemetry after this point. Relative: '5m', '1h', '24h', '7d'. Absolute: ISO 8601 string e.g. '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'.

until.description: Only include telemetry before this point. Use with since to isolate a time window, e.g. since='2d' until='1d' = yesterday only.

languageModelTools.name: otel-insights_summarizeRecentActivity
languageModelTools.modelDescription: ALWAYS call this tool first when the user asks about their application's health, status, performance, or telemetry in general. Returns a high-level summary: trace/span/log counts, error rate, p95 latency, LLM token usage, and tool call totals.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get a quick health overview of your application's telemetry.

since.description: Only include telemetry after this point. Relative: '5m', '1h', '24h', '7d'. Absolute: ISO 8601 string e.g. '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'.

until.description: Only include telemetry before this point. Relative: '1d' means 'more than 1 day ago'. Use with since to isolate a window, e.g. since='2d' until='1d' = yesterday only.

languageModelTools.name: otel-insights_findRecentErrors
languageModelTools.modelDescription: ALWAYS call this tool when the user asks about errors, failures, exceptions, crashes, what broke, or recent problems. Returns the most recent error traces with errored span details including exception type and message.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find the most recent error traces in your application.

limit.description: Maximum number of error traces to return. Defaults to 5.

since.description: Only include errors after this point. Relative: '5m', '1h', '24h', '7d'. Absolute: ISO 8601 string e.g. '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'.

until.description: Only include errors before this point. Use with since to isolate a time window.

languageModelTools.name: otel-insights_getSlowestSpans
languageModelTools.modelDescription: ALWAYS call this tool when the user asks anything related to slowness or performance — including: 'why did it take so long', 'why is it slow', 'what's taking so long', 'why was it slow', 'it's too slow', 'slow response', 'slow request', 'slow tool call', 'slow agent', 'high latency', 'latency spike', 'timeout', 'lag', 'delay', 'bottleneck', 'performance problem', 'performance regression', 'what is the slowest', 'optimize', 'speed up'. This applies to questions about ANY system emitting telemetry — the user's app, agent, LLM calls, tool calls, or any traced operation. Returns the slowest operations aggregated by span name, sorted by average duration descending, with avg/max duration and error counts.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find the slowest operations in your application.

limit.description: Maximum number of operations to return. Defaults to 10.

since.description: Only include spans after this point. Relative: '5m', '1h', '24h', '7d'. Absolute: ISO 8601 string e.g. '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'.

until.description: Only include spans before this point. Use with since to isolate a time window.

languageModelTools.name: otel-insights_searchLogs
languageModelTools.modelDescription: ALWAYS call this tool when the user asks about logs, log messages, log output, or wants to search for a specific message, error string, or keyword in logs.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search your application logs for a keyword or phrase.

query.description: Text to search for in log body, service name, or severity.

minSeverity.description: Minimum OTLP severity number. 0=all, 9=INFO+, 13=WARN+, 17=ERROR+. Defaults to 0.

limit.description: Maximum number of log records to return. Defaults to 50.

since.description: Only include logs after this point. Relative: '5m', '1h', '24h', '7d'. Absolute: ISO 8601 string e.g. '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'.

until.description: Only include logs before this point. Use with since to isolate a time window.

languageModelTools.name: otel-insights_getAgentMetrics
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns both LLM token usage and tool call statistics in a single call. Token usage is grouped by model and shows prompt/completion tokens, call count, and output/input ratio. Tool call stats show call count, error rate, and average duration per tool. ALWAYS call this when the user asks about token consumption, LLM cost, model usage, tool call behavior, which tools are failing, or tool performance.
languageModelTools.userDescription: See token usage and tool call stats for your agent.

since.description: Only include spans after this point. Relative: '5m', '1h', '24h', '7d'. Absolute: ISO 8601 string e.g. '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'.

until.description: Only include spans before this point. Use with since to isolate a time window, e.g. since='2d' until='1d' = yesterday only.
